steps.title: Use indirect evidence
steps.content: The passage says PSP structures usually do not fossilize, so researchers must rely on fossil clues such as large foramina. The blank needs a verb for reaching a conclusion from indirect evidence.

steps.title: Reject physical actions
steps.content: Choice B would mean keeping PSP intact, but the structures do not typically fossilize. Choice C means separating something out. Choice D means obtaining something, not drawing a conclusion from clues.

steps.title: Choose the evidence verb
steps.content: Infer means to conclude something from evidence, which is exactly what researchers do when they use fossil indicators to determine whether PSP was present. The answer is A.
